data.title: Jinko ESS and Taliva Energy Sign 400MWh Energy Storage Project Portfolio
data.description: In Munich on July 1, 2026, Jinko ESS, a prominent energy storage company and subsidiary of JinkoSolar Co., Ltd., joined forces with Taliva Energy, a clean energy company specializing in comprehensive energy storage solutions and large-scale energy infrastructure projects in Romania. The collaboration brings together two industry leaders to enhance energy storage capabilities and expand clean energy infrastructure in the region. This partnership aims to advance sustainable energy solutions and leverage their combined expertise to support the growing demand for renewable energy.

data.title: Guest Supply Signs Asia-Pacific Licensing Agreement with HAAN
data.description: On July 2, 2026, Hong Kong-based Guest Supply Asia disclosed an agreement with HAAN to produce and sell HAAN-branded personal care items specifically for hotels in the Asia Pacific region. The agreement signifies a significant move for the companies to provide these products to hotel customers in the region.

data.title: Exceptional assays show why high-grade core stands to super-charge early production profile at FireFly’s Green Bay
data.description: New assay results reveal significant mineralization with intercepts of 42 meters grading at 6.1% CuEq and 9.8 meters at 16.5% CuEq. These results highlight the consistent high-grade nature of the deposit and will be incorporated into the upcoming economic assessments.

data.title: Elliott Management Statement on Northern Star Resources Ltd
data.description: On July 1, 2026, in West Palm Beach, Florida, Elliott Investment Management L.P. announced that their managed funds have investments totaling more than A$1 billion in Northern Star Resources Ltd. This statement was released by Elliott, emphasizing their significant financial stake in the company.

data.title: Antebi warns defense budget strain, urges new Israeli government to control spending. Polymarket retains Eizenkot at 39%.
data.description: During a recent conference, Yadin Antebi, the CEO of Bank Hapoalim, emphasized the importance of the next Israeli government to control defense expenditures. Antebi cautioned that such decisions will significantly impact the country's overall living standards.

data.title: Forgent Power Solutions Announces Pricing of Upsized Public Offering of Class A Common Stock
data.description: In Dayton, Minnesota, Forgent Power Solutions, Inc. (NYSE: FPS) disclosed the pricing of an increased public offering of its Class A common stock at $49.00 per share. The offering includes 29,094,075 shares of Class A common stock by parent entities of the Company. Forgent is a prominent manufacturer of electrical distribution equipment utilized in data centers, power grids, and energy-intensive industrial settings.
